outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed and stable due to heavily positive aggregate GEX across all expiries, favoring mean-reverting price action.
outlook.summary: The market structure is defined by massive positive Total GEX (4.06B combined), indicating dealers are heavily long gamma. This creates a highly stable, mean-reverting environment. Spot is grinding near the major 0DTE 27000 Call Wall, while a dense cluster of Call Confluences and Resonances above (26700-27500) acts as a strong magnetic ceiling. Downside is protected by Triple-Expiry Put Resonances at 26000 and 26200, securing a defined and well-hedged trading range.
